name: Boston Chicken & KFC Rotisserie Style Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well in a saucepan and warm just to melt the honey.
2. Arrange 4 chicken breast halves, skin-side-up, in a square baking dish or pan sprayed with Pam.
3. Bake uncovered at 400°F for about 35 to 40 minutes, basting the chicken without turning it 3 or 4 times during baking until nicely browned.
4. Immediately after removing from the oven, seal the baking dish tightly with foil and let stand 15 to 20 minutes before serving.
